post.description:
Enrich a contact using the Apollo People Enrichment API.

Only fills in fields that are currently empty/null on the contact.

Extract structured data from contact bios using AI.

Parses twitter_bio, telegram_bio, linkedin_bio/headline and the contact's
name fields through Haiku to extract title, company, website, and
normalize name fields (e.g. "Anders | LoopFi" -> first: Anders, company: LoopFi).
Also updates the linked Organization record with extracted company details.
Remove '2nd Tier' tag from a contact, promoting it to 1st Tier.

patch.description: Update a manual note's content. Only platform='manual' interactions are editable.

delete.description: Delete a manual note. Only platform='manual' interactions can be deleted.
Permanently delete the authenticated user's account and all data.

get.description: Return the Google OAuth consent screen URL.

post.description:
Exchange a Google authorization code for a JWT access token.

- Validates the ``state`` parameter against the server-side nonce store
  to prevent CSRF attacks.
- If the state was created by an authenticated user (connect-account flow),
  verifies that the current authenticated user matches the stored user_id.
- If a user with the returned email already exists, update their refresh token.
- Otherwise create a new account from the Google profile information.
Change the authenticated user's password.

get.description: List pending follow-up suggestions for the current user, with contact info.
Return the weekly digest data for the current user.

put.description:
Update suggestion status.

- **sent**: marks sent, updates contact.last_followup_at
- **snoozed**: accepts snooze_until or scheduled_for datetime
- **dismissed**: marks dismissed

post.description:
Manually trigger suggestion generation for the current user.

If no contacts have been scored yet, runs score recalculation first
so the engine has data to work with.
Re-generate the AI-drafted message for an existing suggestion.

Initiate Telegram login by sending an OTP to *phone*.

The returned ``phone_code_hash`` must be passed back to
``POST /api/v1/auth/telegram/verify``.

Complete Telegram sign-in with the OTP code.

On success the session is stored and the user is connected to Telegram.

Complete Telegram sign-in for accounts with two-step verification enabled.

Must be called after ``/verify`` returns ``requires_2fa: true``.

Dispatch a background Telegram sync for the authenticated user.

Returns immediately with status "started". A notification is created
when the sync completes.

post.description: Receive profile and message data from the LinkedIn Chrome Extension.

get.description: Return a unified activity feed of recent interactions across all contacts.

post.description:
Authenticated user submits a pairing code from the extension popup.

Creates an ExtensionPairing record with a scoped JWT, and marks
the user's linkedin_extension_paired_at timestamp.

get.description:
Unauthenticated endpoint polled by the extension after the user enters their code.

Returns the scoped JWT when the pairing is ready.
Increments attempt counter to prevent brute-force enumeration.

delete.description:
Authenticated endpoint to disconnect the extension.

Deletes all pairing records for the user and clears linkedin_extension_paired_at.

post.description:
Exchange a (possibly expired) extension JWT for a fresh one.

Accepts tokens whose `exp` is within the past `_REFRESH_GRACE_DAYS`. Rejects
tokens without the extension audience, tokens older than the grace window,
and users who have disconnected the extension (linkedin_extension_paired_at
is NULL). On permanent rejection with a resolvable user, also clears
`linkedin_extension_paired_at` so the web UI reverts to a "Connect" state
without requiring a manual disconnect.

get.description: List sync events for the current user, most recent first.
Quick stats: total syncs, success rate, last sync per platform.

post.description: Dispatch a background WhatsApp backfill sync for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Disconnect WhatsApp: destroy the sidecar session and clear user fields.

post.description: Receive events from the whatsapp-sidecar service.
